airport.name: Sanya Phoenix International Airport
airport.toCity: Take a taxi, airport shuttle, or bus to city center.

transport.metro: Light rail available in some areas; check routes for tourist spots.
transport.taxi: Taxis are metered; ensure driver uses it or agree on fare.
transport.didi: Didi app works well; download before arriving for easy rides.
tips: Use official taxi stands to avoid scams.
Negotiate prices for non-metered rides beforehand.
Public buses are cheap but can be crowded.

payment.alipay: Widely accepted; set up with a foreign card if possible.
payment.wechatPay: Common payment method; link a card or use cash top-up.
payment.cash: Carry small yuan bills for street vendors and taxis.
payment.foreignCard: Accepted at major hotels and shops; use ATMs for cash.

recommendedAreas: Yalong Bay for luxury resorts and private beaches.
Dadonghai for budget stays near the beach and nightlife.
tips: Book in advance during peak season for best rates.
Check recent reviews for cleanliness and service quality.

mustTry: Fresh seafood grilled at night markets.
Hainanese chicken rice, a local staple.
foodStreets: Sanya First Market for fresh seafood dishes.
Jiefang Road Food Street with various options.
tips: Eat at busy stalls for fresher seafood.
Try local fruits from street vendors for authenticity.

commonScams: Avoid unlicensed tour operators with hidden fees.
Be cautious of overly cheap seafood offers that may be stale.
Verify prices and services before agreeing to avoid overcharging.

emergency.localTip: Ask hotel staff for help in emergencies or translations.

usefulApps: WeChat for communication, payments, and local services.
Baidu Maps for navigation and finding attractions.
Didi for ride-hailing with English interface.
bestTimeToVisit: November to April for pleasant weather and fewer crowds.
touristTips: Stay hydrated and use sunscreen in the tropical climate.
Respect local customs and dress modestly at temples.
Keep valuables secure in crowded tourist areas.
Learn basic Mandarin phrases for easier interactions.
Wear comfortable shoes for exploring beaches and markets.
